name: Election to Defer Development Expenditures

eligibility.description: Election must be made for the total amount of expenditures for a specific mine and is binding for that taxable year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to defer development expenses and deduct them ratably as the minerals are sold, which is useful for offsetting future income in higher tax brackets.
